title: Surgeon Vacancy at Natco Pharma South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Natco Pharma South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Natco Pharma South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Natco Pharma South Asia Partners:
Natco Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma South Asia Partners!
